headline: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
subject: 🚨 AI Alert: 5 new launches — Google AI Blog, CNBC Technology, AWS Machine Learning

article_items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
article_items.description: This year at Google I/O 2026, we announced Gemini Omni, Google Antigravity, Universal Cart and so much more. Here are the highlights.
article_items.excerpt: This year at Google I/O 2026, we announced Gemini Omni, Google Antigravity, Universal Cart and so much more. Here are the highlights.

article_items.title: Bezos defends billionaires, hypes AI, talks taxes and praises Trump in major CNBC interview
article_items.description: Jeff Bezos rejected accusations that Amazon's decision to release a documentary on first lady Melania Trump was an effort to curry favor with the president.
article_items.excerpt: Jeff Bezos rejected accusations that Amazon's decision to release a documentary on first lady Melania Trump was an effort to curry favor with the president.

article_items.title: Multimodal evaluators: MLLM-as-a-judge for image-to-text tasks in Strands Evals | Amazon Web Services
article_items.description: If you’re building visual shopping, image or document understanding, or chart analysis, you need a way to verify whether your model’s response is actually grounded in the source image. A text-only evaluator cannot tell you whether a caption faithfully describes an image, whether an extracted invoice total matches the document, or whether a screen summary […]
article_items.excerpt: If you’re building visual shopping, image or document understanding, or chart analysis, you need a way to verify whether your model’s response is actually grounded in the source image. A text-only evaluator cannot tell you whether a caption faithfully describes an image, whether an extracted invoice total matches the document, or whether a screen summary […]

article_items.title: Interpreters in Deep Agents: Code Between Tool Calls and Sandboxes
article_items.description: Deep Agents now supports interpreters: small embedded runtimes where agents write code to coordinate tools, hold working state, and decide what enters model context.
article_items.excerpt: Deep Agents now supports interpreters: small embedded runtimes where agents write code to coordinate tools, hold working state, and decide what enters model context.

article_items.title: I Gave My OpenClaw Agent a Physical Body
article_items.description: The coding skills of AI models are about to make it much easier to build and deploy robots.
article_items.excerpt: The coding skills of AI models are about to make it much easier to build and deploy robots.
